summary: Aloha/Choices reference content renders as a long dense text block; scanning and section separation are weak.

evidence.note: Observed in mobile reference view while switching sections.

repro: Dashboard -> View Jobs and Recipes (Reference) -> Section: Aloha + Choices

summary: Automation reliability was limited by missing stable keys on hub/menu controls.

evidence.note: Resolved by adding stable ValueKey selectors to app menu and dashboard hub buttons.

repro: Automated traversal of Dashboard hub and hamburger actions
